M/CAL  BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/AMENDCOM  COUNT TWO AS 490,2PC AS A MISDEMEANOR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFTADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTY PLEA & REFRD TO DIVERSN/X: THETERMS OF THE DEJ ARE AS FOLLOWS:/X: FOR ONE YEAR, DEFENDANT MUST PICK UP NO NEW CASES, MUST ABIDE BY THE STAY AWAY ORDER CURRENTLY IN PLACE, MUST MAINTAIN EITHER FULL-TIME EMPLYMENT OR A FULL TIME SCHOOL PROGRAM, OR MUST PROVE THAT HE IS ACTIVELY SEEKING FULL TIME EMPLOYMENT,/X: FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRAM WILL RESULT IN THE FOLLOWING SENTENCE BEING IMPOSED;/X: ISS, ONE YEAR COURT PROBATION, 9 D CJ, 9 D CTS, COMPLETE THETHINKING FOR A CHANGE  PROGRAM, ABIDE BY THE STAY AWAY ORDER CURRENTLY INPLACE, PAYRESTITUTION, IF ANY,  TO THE NAMED VICTIM,/OR/CONTD: STATUS OFDEJ PROGRAM/DOPU: IF REPORT IS POSITIVE/
CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCEBY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 06-16-21,/X: BAILSET AT $20000,/DOPC/
